title: rubus harpaginetulus
intro: Rubus harpaginetulus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Bramble, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is known to have various health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Rubus harpaginetulus can be consumed as a tea, taken as a tincture, or used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The plant's leaves and roots are also used to make a salve or ointment to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
